text.title: QA Flake Ledger Template Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed in real deployments. Each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Flake survives 3 months without a fix; nobody owns it.
antipattern.fix: Assign from CODEOWNERS at ingest; reject row without owner.

antipattern.symptom: Counts drift from CI reality; reviewers argue about whether the flake is still active.
antipattern.root-cause: counts-from-ci ignored; numbers entered by hand.
antipattern.fix: Automate ingest from CI api; fail the pipeline if counts not refreshed in 7 days.

antipattern.symptom: Tests sit in quarantine for 9 months; no decision; quarantine list grows linearly.
antipattern.fix: Add weekly review; force fix-or-delete on rows >30d in quarantine.
